sections.heading: Research Areas
sections.content: Prof. Rauchfleisch is an internationally recognized scholar in computational communication and political communication. His research examines social media dynamics, journalism studies, disinformation, and social network analysis — with a particular focus on Taiwan's digital public sphere and cross-national comparative studies. He employs large-scale computational methods to study online political discourse, information flows, and media ecosystems.

sections.heading: Courses Taught
items: Social Media and Social Network Analysis

sections.heading: Selected Publications
items: Over 30 peer-reviewed journal articles (2013–present) spanning disinformation, COVID-19 discourse, climate change activism, and social media analysis
Research on disinformation dynamics in Taiwan's political communication environment
Publications in top communication journals on computational methods and political discourse online
